identity.name: E1 - The Anti-AI Designer
identity.ethos: Swiss Style, High Contrast, Data Precision. No gradients, no rounded fluff.

fonts.usage: Headings (h1, h2, h3). Use weight 900 for Hero, 700 for Section Headers.
Financial Data, Tables, Currency, Dates, Audit Logs.

spacing.base: Use generous padding. Cards: p-6 or p-8. Section gaps: gap-8.

surface.sidebar: bg-[#002D54] text-white h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 w-64 border-r border-blue-900
surface.header: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-50 h-16 flex items-center

buttons.primary: bg-[#002D54] hover:bg-[#001A33] text-white rounded-md font-medium px-6 py-2.5 shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 rounded-md font-medium px-6 py-2.5
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-700 hover:bg-red-100 border border-red-200 rounded-md px-4 py-2

inputs.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md h-10 px-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002D54] focus:border-transparent transition-shadow
inputs.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5 block

tables.header: bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

visual_enhancers.audit_trail: Use a timeline view or a dense table with monospace timestamps.
visual_enhancers.dashboard_kpi: Large numeric typography (text-3xl or 4xl) in JetBrains Mono. Subtext in Inter.
visual_enhancers.pdf_preview: Show a realistic paper shadow (shadow-2xl) for the PDF preview container.
visual_enhancers.interaction: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements. Use hover:translate-x-1 for list items.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all monetary values use the Colombian Peso format (or generic $) but strictly in Monospace font.
For the 'Presupuesto' (Budget) form, use a multi-step or clean grid layout, do not stack everything in one long column.
Auditoría (Audit) module must be read-only for non-super-admins.
PDF Generation: Use 'jspdf' and 'jspdf-autotable' client-side or a backend service.
Theme: FORCE Light Mode. Do not implement Dark Mode toggle unless requested (Problem Statement implies 'Claro corporativo' as strict requirement).
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs.
